query:
-- Verificar se ainda existem leads órfãos
SELECT COUNT(*) as leads_orfaos_restantes
FROM leads 
WHERE status = 'em_atendimento' 
  AND corretorId NOT IN (
    SELECT id FROM users WHERE role = 'corretor'
  );

-- Verificar distribuição atual de leads em atendimento por corretor
SELECT 
  u.name,
  u.email,
  COUNT(l.id) as total_leads_em_atendimento
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN leads l ON u.id = l.corretorId AND l.status = 'em_atendimento'
WHERE u.role = 'corretor'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
ORDER BY total_leads_em_atendimento DESC;

-- Verificar total geral
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_em_atendimento,
  COUNT(DISTINCT corretorId) as corretores_com_leads
FROM leads 
WHERE status = 'em_atendimento';
